text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After spending the day out with Super Creek, I
head over to the library.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've been taking it easy as I study different
training methods—just as I promised to Super
Creek. Then one day...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: We did it, Trainer! My time has improved!
choice_data_list:
It's because you've been working so hard,
Creek!

It's because you've been working so hard,
Creek!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'm so glad all our hard work is paying off. Hehe!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: ...Oh? Look, Trainer. Over there...

text_block_list.name: Short-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Huff... puff... Trainer... I-I'm sorry I can't manage... a better time...

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
It's not your fault. It's mine for lacking the power
to support you as a trainer.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Let's call it a day. I'll think of a new training plan
for next time.

text_block_list.name: Short-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Then, um... I'll also...

text_block_list.name: Short-Haired Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Actually, never mind... Thank you for today.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: It's that trainer from before.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text: Sigh... What do I even do? This is all my fault. At this rate, she—
choice_data_list: You should talk to her some more.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me? And who asked for—oh, it's you two...
You were listening?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sorry. We happened to overhear your
conversation.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Still... I agree with my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
This is none of your business. It's my own inability
that's to blame. I don't intend to point any fingers
at my trainee.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Well, we're making it our business. I just want to
tell you that you're wrong.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm sure she's worried about you and wants to talk
with you about it, just like I do with my trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
She wants to better understand your hardships
and share them with you.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text: ...My hardships?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm sure of it.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text: But I could never put that on her...
choice_data_list: Some things can't be solved on your own.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
If you two gain a deeper understanding of each
other, you might also be able to find a solution to
your problems.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
She isn't just an athlete whose sole purpose is to
run—Umamusume are more than that.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
...Yeah. You might be right. Thanks. I'll start by
trying to talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Serious Trainer
text_block_list.text:
And... I'm sorry for all the mean things I said
before.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I think our little talk with that other trainer...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Will help her to form a good relationship with her
Umamusume—just like the one we have.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You really are kind. Who's a good trainer?! Yes,
you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it's important to share a bond, I feel like
I'm being spoiled a bit too much. I need to reflect
on my actions. From now on...
choice_data_list: I won't allow myself to be spoiled anymore!
I will become a more dependable trainer!
I'll be the one doing the pampering!
I'll be the one doing the pampering!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
While it's important to share a bond, I feel like
I'm being spoiled a bit too much. I need to reflect
on my actions. From now on...
choice_data_list: I won't allow myself to be spoiled anymore!
I will become a more dependable trainer!
I'll be the one doing the pampering!
I'll be the one doing the pampering!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Huuuuh? But why?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
No... I can't bear the thought of no longer being
able to pamper you...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
It's just too sad... Too lonely... It's making me
cry...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I won't be able to work hard during training... Sniffle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I panic and take back what I had just said, only to
notice a cheeky grin spreading across Super
Creek's face.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. If you become any more reliable, I won't be
able to take care of you any longer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Still, I know there are people out there who don't
know how truly reliable you are.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'll just have to show my trainer off to the world
through my races.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I can't wait for the day when everybody discovers
how incredible you are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Goodness gracious! You? Pampering me? That
must mean...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You'll let me spoil you to the moon and back,
right?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehehe, that makes me so happy.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Always such a sweet little cutie, aren't you? I'll
keep spoiling you rotten! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to say otherwise, but Super Creek pretends
not to hear me.
